# godaddy_domain_forwarding (Resource)

Manage GoDaddy URL forwarding for one FQDN.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fqdn` (String) Forwarded FQDN.
- `type` (String) Forward type: MASKED, REDIRECT_PERMANENT, or REDIRECT_TEMPORARY.
- `url` (String) Destination URL.

### Optional

- `mask` (Attributes) Optional forwarding mask settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mask))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Canonical resource identifier equal to the FQDN.

<a id="nestedatt--mask"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mask`

Optional:

- `description` (String) Mask description.
- `keywords` (String) Mask keywords.
- `title` (String) Mask title.
